label_change_policy: No label is declared incorrect; all suspected issues require human review.

recommendations.basis: 160 validation errors observed out of 522 images.
recommendations.recommendation: Prioritize human review of validation errors before changing labels or model settings.
Review intact boundary cases as visual ambiguities, not automatic label errors.
Review broken boundary cases and document visual criteria before any dataset edit.

recommendations.basis: 283 low-confidence cases and 128 low-margin cases on validation.
recommendations.recommendation: Use low-confidence and low-margin cases as a review queue for decision-boundary analysis.
Inspect whether visual quality warnings explain errors before changing preprocessing.
